roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps and imported-subscription lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR -> class LiveUsageCoordinator (required for cron-free live usage)

features: live usage remains autonomous through Durable Object alarms and does not depend on user activity or cron triggers
PasarGuard requests have a 12-second timeout and one retry for temporary GET failures
an under-scoped PasarGuard API key automatically falls back to configured owner credentials without stopping billing
API key validation now verifies admins.read because representative usage requires the admins list endpoint
manager usage lookup has a compatibility fallback and explicit manager-not-found diagnostics
the central miniapp shows the exact representative and upstream error instead of only a generic partial failure badge
billing idempotency, zero-balance suspension, subscription import, CubePay, Plisio, automatic USD rates and report topics are preserved

deployment.migration_tag: v3.1.9-live-usage (unchanged; no new Durable Object migration)
deployment.automatic_provisioning: supported when cf_account_id, cf_api_token and cf_worker_name are already saved and the token can update Workers scripts
deployment.activation: deploy all three workers; LIVE_USAGE_COORDINATOR continues using the existing Durable Object class and alarm state
deployment.cron: the existing 10-minute central cron can remain; it is not used for live usage while the Durable Object binding is active

validation.release_manifest_hashes: recalculated from packaged bytes and passed uploader-compatible validation
